An agentic doc repo makes documentation retrievable

Normal docs often become a polite graveyard. Agentic docs are built so people and software can find the rule when it matters.

Where it removes work

  • Less repeated tribal knowledge
  • Better agent context for recurring workflows
  • A cleaner source of truth for process and policy

What Sysmatic would build

  • Organize docs around workflows and decisions
  • Add metadata, ownership, and freshness rules
  • Connect retrieval to the tools where work happens
